warscrolls.name: Bladebringer, Herald on Exalted Chariot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, War Machine, Wizard (1), Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Mutilating Blades
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Soulgorgers
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.declare: Pick up to 3 visible friendly non‑**UNIQUE HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WAR MACHINES** wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn. This ability also affects **Companion** weapons.

warscrolls.notes: This unit will move to Warhammer Legends on 1 June 2027.

warscrolls.name: Bladebringer, Herald on Hellflayer
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, War Machine, Wizard (1), Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Slavering For Sensation
abilities.declare: Pick up to 2 friendly **Hellflayer** units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this unit and each target for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Threshing Doom
abilities.effect: When this unit moves, it can pass through models in enemy **INFANTRY** units and can pass through the combat ranges of enemy **INFANTRY** units, but it cannot end a move in combat unless specified in the ability used.

abilities.name: Soulscent
abilities.declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that this unit passed across this phase to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If any models are slain by this ability, this unit has **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Bladebringer, Herald on Seeker Chariot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, War Machine, Wizard (1), Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Mutilating Blades
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Thrillseeking Cavalcade
abilities.declare: Pick up to 3 friendly **Seeker Chariot** units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for this unit and the targets for the rest of the turn. In addition, for the rest of the turn, when this unit and the targets use the ‘Mutilating Blades’ ability, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted (if any).

warscrolls.name: Blissbarb Archers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Blissbrew Homonculus
abilities.effect:
This unit’s **Blissbrew Homonculi** are tokens. There is 1 **Blissbrew Homonculus** for every 10 models in this unit.

This unit has **WARD (6+)** while it has any **Blissbrew Homonculi**. If you make an unmodified ward roll of 1 for this unit, remove 1 of this unit’s **Blissbrew Homonculi** from the battlefield (the damage point is still inflicted).

abilities.name: The Thrill of Combat
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit in combat to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, this unit’s ranged weapons have **Shoot in Combat** and they also have **Crit (Auto-wound)** for attacks that target that enemy unit.

warscrolls.name: Blissbarb Seekers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Adrenaline Archers
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
abilities.effect: This unit can use **SHOOT** abilities this turn even if it used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn. In addition, for the rest of the turn, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by **RETREAT** abilities.

warscrolls.name: Contorted Epitome
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (4+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: The Mirror's Depths
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.

abilities.name: Swallow Energy
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick a visible **MANIFESTATION** within 12" of this unit and that was not summoned this turn to be the target, then make a banishment roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
If the banishment roll equals or exceeds the banishment value on the target’s warscroll, it is banished and removed from play. 

The next time a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses a **SUMMON** ability, roll an additional D6, to a maximum of 3, when making the casting roll for that ability.

warscrolls.name: Daemonettes
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Musician (1/10), Standard Bearer (1/10), Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Lithe and Swift
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this turn, it can move D3+3". It can pass through enemy models and the combat ranges of enemy units but must end that move within ½" of a visible enemy unit.

warscrolls.name: Dexcessa, the Talon of Slaanesh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Fly, Ward (5+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Fleeting Dance of Death
abilities.effect: This unit can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it is in combat.

abilities.name: You! Amuse Us!
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a FIGHT ability for this unit
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly **PARAGON** that has not used a **FIGHT** ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range and visible to this unit to be the target. The target can be picked to use a **FIGHT** ability immediately after the **FIGHT** ability used by this unit has been resolved.

abilities.name: Redolence of Violence
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll 2D6. If this unit charged this turn, add 2 to the roll. If the roll exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target is automatically slain. If the target is a **MANIFESTATION** and the roll exceeds its banishment value, it is banished.

abilities.name: Joyous Battle Fury
abilities.effect: If any enemy models were slain by this unit’s combat attacks this turn, **Heal (D3)** this unit and add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Impaling Talons** for the rest of the battle. This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join Synessa’s regiment.

warscrolls.name: Dreadful Visage
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh

abilities.name: Flensing Tongues
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this **MANIFESTATION** to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Until this **MANIFESTATION** is banished or destroyed, the target is **tongue-tied** while it is within 12" of this **MANIFESTATION**. While the target is **tongue-tied**:

• It cannot use **RUN** abilities.
• Your opponent must roll a D6 instead of a D3 when determining the amount of mortal damage inflicted on the target when it uses a **RETREAT** ability.

warscrolls.name: Exalted Chariot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Excess of Blades
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the unmodified charge roll for that **CHARGE** ability. For each roll that exceeds the target’s Save characteristic, the target suffers 1 mortal damage.

warscrolls.name: Fane of Slaanesh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Faction Terrain, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh

abilities.name: Damned Conduit
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this terrain feature to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, while the target is within **X"** of this terrain feature, the target’s weapons have the **Companion** weapon ability, where **X** is determined by the current battle round as follows:

**Battle Round - X**
1 - 9"
2 - 12"
3 - 15"
4 - 18"
5 - 21"

warscrolls.loadout:
The following universal terrain abilities apply to this terrain feature (Terrain, 1.2):

Cover, Impassable

warscrolls.name: Fiends
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Beast, Champion, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Beast
abilities.effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

abilities.name: Disharmonious Song
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick each visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit that did not use a **CHARGE** or **FIGHT** ability this turn to be a target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. You can re-roll the dice if the target is a **WIZARD** or **PRIEST**. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

abilities.name: Arcane Disruption
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from casting rolls and unbinding rolls for enemy **WIZARDS** while they are within 12" of this unit.

warscrolls.name: Glutos Orscollion, Lord of Gluttony
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, War Machine, Wizard (2), Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite, Paragon

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Kyazu’s Greatblade and Mutants’ Claws** is 4.

abilities.name: Crippling Famishment
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:
• Halve the target’s Move characteristic.
• Halve run rolls and charge rolls for the target.

abilities.name: Gorge on Excess
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly **SYBARITE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: **Heal (6)** the target or return a number of slain models to the target with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.

abilities.name: Paragon of Gluttony
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following delicacies for Glutos to savour. You cannot pick a delicacy that you picked in the previous turn. The effect applies for the rest of the turn:

***Heart of a Shadow Daemon***: While they are wholly within 12" of this unit, friendly non-**MONSTER** **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units are not visible to enemy units more than 12" from them.

***Blood of an Aelven Princeling***: Each time a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses a **RUN** ability, if you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.

***Crushed Incarnate’s Core***: Add 1 to unbinding rolls and banishment rolls for this unit.

***Unspeakable Viscera***: Inflict D6 mortal damage on each other unit (friendly and enemy) within this unit’s combat range.

warscrolls.name: Hellflayer
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Threshing Doom
abilities.effect: When this unit moves, it can pass through models in enemy **INFANTRY** units and can pass through the combat ranges of enemy **INFANTRY** units, but it cannot end a move in combat unless specified in the ability used.

abilities.name: Soulscent
abilities.declare: Pick up to 3 enemy units that this unit passed across this phase to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If any models are slain by this ability, this unit has **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.notes: This unit will move to Warhammer Legends on 1 June 2027.

warscrolls.name: Hellstriders
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Musician (1/5), Standard Bearer (1/5), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Maiming Charge
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this turn, subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy **INFANTRY** units while they are in combat with this unit.

warscrolls.notes: This unit will move to Warhammer Legends on 1 June 2027.

warscrolls.name: Infernal Enrapturess, Herald of Slaanesh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Maestros of Discordance
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the enemy target. Then, you can pick another visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the friendly target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the enemy target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the enemy target.

Then, you can pick 1 of the following effects:
• **Heal (X)** the friendly target, where **X** is the number of enemy models slain by this ability this phase.
• Return a number of slain models to the friendly target unit with a total Health characteristic equal to or less than the number of enemy models slain by this ability this phase.

abilities.name: Spell-Shredding Symphony
abilities.effect: This unit can use **UNBIND** and **BANISH** abilities as if it had **WIZARD (1)**. In addition, each time this unit successfully unbinds a spell, inflict D3 mortal damage on the caster and each time this unit successfully banishes a **MANIFESTATION**, inflict D3 mortal damage on the unit that summoned that **MANIFESTATION**.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Slaaneshi Beguiler.

warscrolls.name: Keeper of Secrets
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Monster, Wizard (2), Ward (5+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Elegant Greatblade** is 3.

abilities.name: Supernatural Grace
abilities.effect: This unit can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by **RETREAT** abilities.

abilities.name: Cacophonic Choir
abilities.declare: Pick any number of visible enemy units within 12" of this unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6. Subtract 1 from the casting roll for each target you picked after the first.
abilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.

abilities.name: Locus of Slaanesh
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON** unit that started the battle with 3 or more models and has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Dark Temptations
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following musks. Its effects apply for the rest of the turn.

***Alluring Musk***:
• This unit’s weapons have **Crit (2 Hits)** for attacks that target that enemy unit.
• Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by that enemy unit that target this unit.

***Psychotropic Musk***:
• Subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks made by that enemy unit that target this unit.
• Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons.

warscrolls.name: Lord of Hubris
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Allow Me To Demonstrate
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly non-**HERO SYBARITE** unit that has not used a **FIGHT** ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a **FIGHT** ability immediately after the **FIGHT** ability used by this unit has been resolved. Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by this unit and the target for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: You First, I Insist...
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Your opponent must decide whether the target will **accept** or **decline** this unit’s challenge:

If they **accept**, for the rest of the turn, if this unit is in combat with the target when the target is picked to use a **FIGHT** ability, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks and all of the target’s attacks must target this unit.

If they **decline**, for the rest of the turn:
• The target has **STRIKE-LAST**.
• Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for attacks that target that enemy unit.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Dark Egotist.

warscrolls.name: Lord of Hysteria
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Master of the Revels
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn, pick a visible friendly **SYBARITE** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
If the target is a **PARAGON**, apply the following effect to the target. Otherwise, roll a dice. On a 3+, apply the following effect to the target:

• For the rest of the turn, while the target is wholly within 12" of this unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Slaughterous Celebrants
abilities.effect: While they are wholly within 12" of and visible to this unit, melee weapons used by friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH INFANTRY** units have **Anti-charge (+1 Rend)**.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Dark Egotist.

warscrolls.name: Lord of Pain
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Atrocious Ministrations
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: You can allocate 1 damage point to the target (ward rolls cannot be made for that damage point). Then, roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target can use **CHARGE** abilities even if they used a **RUN** or **RETREAT** ability in the same turn.

abilities.name: Share The Pain
abilities.effect: This unit has **WARD (5+)** while it is in combat. In addition, each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit for a damage point inflicted by a combat attack, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Dark Egotist.

warscrolls.name: Mesmerising Mirror
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh

abilities.name: Irresistible Lure
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Phase (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a **MOVE** ability for a unit within 18" of and visible to this **MANIFESTATION**
abilities.effect: If that enemy unit does not end that move closer to this **MANIFESTATION** than it was at the start of the move, inflict D6 mortal damage on that enemy unit after the **MOVE** ability has been resolved.

warscrolls.name: Myrmidesh Painbringers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: False Serenity
abilities.effect: While this unit has not charged this turn, it has **WARD (5+)**.

abilities.name: Dance of the Wailing Blade
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, for each unmodified hit roll of 1 for a combat attack made by that enemy unit that targets this unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Slaangor Fiendbloods
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Bestial Onslaught
abilities.declare: Pick this unit if it is **waiting in ambush**.
abilities.effect: Set up this unit on the battlefield wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Instinctive Advance
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Phase (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a command for a unit within 12" of this unit
abilities.effect: This unit can move up to 3" immediately after that command has been resolved, unless that command is a reaction, in which case this unit can move after the ability that it was reacting to has been resolved. That move can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units, and can end in combat.

abilities.name: Veiled Threat
abilities.declare: Pick this unit if it has not been deployed.
abilities.effect: Set up this unit in reserve **waiting in ambush**. It has now been deployed.

warscrolls.notes: This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Syll'Esske, the Vengeful Allegiance
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (5+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon, Sybarite

abilities.name: Champions of the Gilded Throne
abilities.effect: When players are alternating picking units to use a **FIGHT** ability, when it is your turn to pick a unit, instead of picking 1 unit, you can pick a friendly non-**HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON** unit wholly within 18" of this unit and a friendly non-**HERO SYBARITE** unit wholly within 18" of this unit. Resolve the second **FIGHT** ability immediately after the first.

abilities.name: Wandering Minds
abilities.declare: Pick up to 1 visible friendly non-**HERO SYBARITE INFANTRY** unit and up to 1 visible friendly non-**HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON INFANTRY** unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: If you picked a **SYBARITE** target, subtract 1 from ward rolls for damage points inflicted by its combat attacks until the start of your next turn. If you picked a **DAEMON** target, it has **WARD (5+)** until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Violent Offerings
abilities.effect: If any damage points were allocated to an enemy **WIZARD** or **PRIEST** by this unit’s combat attacks this turn and that enemy unit has been destroyed, add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the battle. This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.

warscrolls.notes: This unit is legal for Matched Play for battles fought using the General’s Handbook 2025-26 battlepack.

warscrolls.name: Seeker Chariot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Mutilating Blades
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this phase, pick an enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

warscrolls.notes: This unit will move to Warhammer Legends on 1 June 2027.

warscrolls.name: Seekers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Musician (1/5), Standard Bearer (1/5), Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Quicksilver Speed
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.effect: If this unit charged this turn and has not used the ‘Power Through’ command this turn, it can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

warscrolls.name: Shalaxi Helbane
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (2), Ward (5+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon, Paragon

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its **Soulpiercer** is 4.

abilities.name: Paramount Hunter
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a CHARGE ability for a HERO within 12" of this unit
abilities.effect: If this unit is not in combat, it can immediately move up to 2D6". It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units but it must end that move within ½" of that **HERO**. If it does so, this unit has charged, and that **HERO**’s **CHARGE** ability has no effect.

abilities.name: Supernatural Grace
abilities.effect: This unit can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on this unit by **RETREAT** abilities.

abilities.name: An Exquisite Trophy
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy **HERO** or **MONSTER** in combat with this unit to be the target.

abilities.name: Refine Senses
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. Add 1 to the casting roll if this unit is the target.
abilities.effect: The target has **STRIKE-FIRST** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Shardspeaker of Slaanesh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Truths of the Twisted Mirror
abilities.declare: If this unit is a **PARAGON**, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from save rolls for the target.

abilities.name: Bargain with the Mist-Daemons
abilities.phaseDetails: Once per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SPELL** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 1, inflict 2 mortal damage on this unit. On a 3+, add 2 to the casting roll.

warscrolls.name: Sigvald, Prince of Slaanesh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Infantry, Ward (4+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite, Paragon

abilities.name: Paragon of Vainglory
abilities.effect:
If this unit charged this turn and the unmodified charge roll was 6+ , for the rest of the turn:

• This unit has **STRIKE-FIRST**.
• The Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Shardslash** is equal to the unmodified charge roll.
• Melee weapons, including **Companion** weapons, used by other friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units have **Crit (2 Hits)** while they are wholly within 12" of and visible to this unit.

abilities.name: Shardslash
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from ward rolls for damage points inflicted by this unit’s combat attacks.

abilities.name: Gaze Upon My Magnificence and Weep
abilities.declare: If this unit has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Your opponent must decide whether the target will **adulate** or **reject** Sigvald.

***Adulate:*** Until the start of your next turn, while the target is in combat with this unit, it must pick this unit to be the target of pile-in moves it makes.

***Reject:*** Inflict D3+3 mortal damage on the target, then **Heal (X)** this unit, where **X** is the number of damage points inflicted on the target this turn by this ability.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Dark Egotist.

warscrolls.name: Slaangor Fiendbloods
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Bestial Onslaught
abilities.declare: Pick this unit if it is **waiting in ambush**.
abilities.effect: Set up this unit on the battlefield wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Instinctive Advance
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a command for a unit within 12" of this unit
abilities.effect: This unit can move 3" immediately after that command has been resolved, unless that command is a reaction, in which case this unit can move after the ability that it was reacting to has been resolved. It can pass through the combat ranges of enemy units and can end that move in combat. If this unit was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat with the units it was already in combat with at the start of the move.

abilities.name: Veiled Threat
abilities.effect: Set up this unit in reserve **waiting in ambush**. It has now been deployed.

warscrolls.name: Slickblade Seekers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Unrivalled Velocity
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **CHARGE** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: You can re-roll the charge roll.

warscrolls.name: Syll'Esske, the Vengeful Allegiance
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (5+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Champions of the Gilded Throne
abilities.effect: When players are alternating picking units to use a **FIGHT** ability, when it is your turn to pick a unit, instead of picking 1 unit, you can pick a friendly non‑**HERO HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON** unit wholly within 18" of this unit and a friendly non-**HERO** **SYBARITE** unit wholly within 18" of this unit. Resolve the second **FIGHT** ability immediately after the first.

abilities.name: Unholy Symbiosis
abilities.declare: Pick up to 1 visible friendly **SYBARITE** unit and up to 1 visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH DAEMON** unit to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: If you picked a **SYBARITE** target, subtract 1 from ward rolls for damage points inflicted by its combat attacks until the start of your next turn. If you picked a **DAEMON** target, it has **WARD (5+)** until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Violent Offerings
abilities.effect: If any damage points were allocated this turn by this unit’s combat attacks to an enemy **WIZARD**, **PRIEST**, **UNIQUE** unit or unit with an artefact of power, and that enemy unit has been destroyed, add 1 to this unit’s power level for the rest of the battle. This unit can be affected by this ability multiple times and the effects are cumulative.

warscrolls.name: Symbaresh Twinsouls
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Ego-Driven Excess
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons for attacks that target an enemy unit that has a higher Control characteristic than this unit.

abilities.name: Pah! Unworthy!
abilities.effect: While this unit is damaged or has fewer than half its starting models, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of its melee weapons.

warscrolls.name: Synessa, the Voice of Slaanesh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (1), Fly, Ward (5+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Enthralling Splendour
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit with a lower Control characteristic than this unit, that charged this turn and is in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Whispers of Desire
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons.

abilities.name: Arcane Seductor
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy **WIZARD** or **PRIEST** within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a dice. If the roll is higher than the target’s power level, for the rest of the battle round, while the target is within 18" of this unit:
• Subtract 1 from casting rolls and chanting rolls for enemy units while they are within 18" of this unit.
• Add 1 to this unit’s power level.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join Dexcessa’s regiment.

warscrolls.name: The Dread Pageant
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Sybarite

abilities.name: Slicing Fervour
abilities.effect: This unit has **STRIKE-FIRST** while it is in combat with a **blissmarked** unit.

abilities.name: Blissbarb Shafts
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit’s **Hadzu** is on the battlefield, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 4+:
• Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
• The target is **blissmarked** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Weapons of Excess. The models in this unit are:

• Vasillac the Gifted (champion)
• Slakeslash
• Hadzu
• Glissete

warscrolls.name: The Masque
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Infantry, Ward (4+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Captive Audience
abilities.effect: Enemy units cannot use **RETREAT** abilities while they are in combat with this unit.

abilities.name: The Endless Dance
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects:

***The Dance of Dreaming***: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target. For the rest of the turn, if the unmodified hit roll for an attack made by that enemy unit that targets this unit is 1-4, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

***The Pavane of Slaanesh***: This unit can move 2D3". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units and can end that move in combat.

***The Waltz of Lethargy***: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of this unit to be the target. For the rest of the turn, the target cannot use commands while it is in combat with this unit.

warscrolls.notes: This HERO can join an eligible regiment as a Slaaneshi Beguiler.

warscrolls.name: The Thricefold Discord
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Indulgence Given Form
abilities.effect: Each time an enemy unit uses a command while it is within 12" of this unit, give 1 **indulgence point** to this unit, to a maximum of 6.

abilities.name: Sublime Harmonies
abilities.effect: While this unit’s **Vashtiss** is on the battlefield, it has **WIZARD (1)**. In addition, each time you make a casting roll for this unit, you can spend any number of **indulgence points** it has. For each point spent, add 1 to the casting roll.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Carnal Blades and Wicked Claws. The models in this unit are:

• Vexmor, the Excessively Indolent (champion)
• Vashtiss the Coiled
• Lascivyr, the Bladed Blessing

warscrolls.name: Thricefold Discord
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (5+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Gifts of Pain and Pleasure
abilities.declare: Pick either a visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit or a visible enemy unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: If the target is a friendly unit, add 2" to its Move characteristic until the start of your next turn. If the target is an enemy unit, inflict **X** mortal damage on it, then **Heal (X)** this unit. **X** is equal to the number of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Thricefold Court
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Any Turn
abilities.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects that you did not pick in the previous turn. The effect applies for the rest of the turn:

***Sins of Soul***: While an enemy **WIZARD** or **PRIEST** is visible to this unit, add 1 to this unit’s power level.

***Sins of Flesh***: This unit’s attacks score critical hits on unmodifed hit rolls of 5+.

***Sins of Mind***: Each time a visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you receive 3 additional rally points.

warscrolls.loadout:
Each model in this unit is armed with Carnal Blades and Wicked Claws. The models in this unit are:

• Vexmor, the Excessively Indolent (champion)
• Vashtiss the Coiled
• Lascivyr, the Bladed Blessing

warscrolls.name: Viceleader, Herald of Slaanesh
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh, Daemon

abilities.name: Lithe and Swift
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Ravaging Claws** for the rest of the turn if this unit charged in the same turn.

abilities.name: Lust For Violence
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a FIGHT ability for this unit
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly **Daemonettes** unit that has not used a **FIGHT** ability this turn and is within this unit’s combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a **FIGHT** ability immediately after the **FIGHT** ability used by this unit has been resolved.

warscrolls.notes: This Hero can join an eligible regiment as a Slaaneshi Beguiler

warscrolls.name: Wheels of Excruciation
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Chaos, Hedonites of Slaanesh

abilities.name: Exquisite Agony
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this **MANIFESTATION** to be the target.
abilities.effect: Inflict D6 mortal damage on the target.

rules.name: In Search of Sin
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: Pick up to 3 friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH INFANTRY** units to be the targets.
rules.effect: Each target can move D6". It can only end that move in combat with units it was in combat with at the start of that move.

rules.name: Godly Spoor
rules.effect: While they are wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge, friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units can use **CHARGE** abilities even if they used a **RUN** ability in the same turn.

rules.name: Ecstatic Revellers
rules.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly **SYBARITE INFANTRY** units while they are wholly outside friendly territory.

rules.name: Sadistic Tendencies
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with that unit and that had any damage points allocated to it this turn to be the target.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the turn:
• All of the combat attacks made by that friendly unit must target that enemy unit.
• Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that friendly unit’s melee weapons.

rules.name: Prodigy of Excess
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH HERO** that has an artefact of power to be the target.
rules.effect:
Give the target a heroic trait from the ‘Figureheads of the Dark Prince’ or ‘Hedonistic Obsessions’ tables.

**Designer’s Note**: *This heroic trait is given to the target during the deployment phase, not during army composition*.

rules.name: Amidst the Phantasmagoria
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Shooting Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit that had any damage points allocated to it this turn by an enemy ability to be the target.
rules.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield, then set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

armiesOfRenown.name: Court of the Godlings
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Dexcessa is an arrogant force of nature who cannot abide taking orders from another. They see themselves as Slaanesh’s chief warlord, often overthrowing lesser champions and ordering their warhosts to abandon long-fought campaigns and focus on new, bizarre objectives more pleasing to the Talon. Only Synessa’s wicked tongue can convince Dexcessa to listen – and even then the daemon rails at the patience advised by their despised sibling, ever liable to suddenly act.
When you pick the Hedonites of Slaanesh faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Court of the Godlings Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules described in Army of Renown: Court of the Godlings instead of the Hedonites of Slaanesh faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box opposite. All units in your army gain the **COURT OF THE GODLINGS** keyword.

rules.name: The Voice and the Talon
rules.effect: The friendly **Synessa** and **Dexcessa** have the **TWIN** keyword.

rules.name: The More Glorious Slaughter
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Start of Any Turn
rules.declare: If a friendly **TWIN** destroyed an enemy unit in the previous turn and the other did not, pick the one that did not to use this ability.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by units in the regiment of the unit using this ability.

rules.name: The Longer Shadow
rules.declare: If a friendly **TWIN** is contesting an objective you control and the other is not, pick the one that is not to use this ability.
rules.effect: Until the start of your next turn, while the unit using this ability is contesting an objective you control, add 5 to the control scores of units in its regiment.

rules.name: The Grander Visage
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
rules.declare: If either friendly **TWIN** is damaged, pick the one with fewer or no damage points to use this ability.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, the unit using this ability has **WARD (4+)**.

rules.name: The Swifter Surge
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
rules.declare: If a friendly **TWIN** charged in the previous turn and the other did not, pick the one that did not to use this ability.
rules.effect: For the rest of the phase, when making charge rolls for units in the regiment of the unit using this ability, add 1 to the number of dice rolled, to a maximum of 3, then remove 1 dice of your choice and use the remaining dice as the charge roll.

rules.name: The More Cunning Ruse
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: If both friendly **TWINS** are within 12" of and visible to each other, pick one of them to use this ability.
rules.effect: Remove the unit using this ability from the battlefield and set it up on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: The Triplet Trinket
artefacts.effect:
While a friendly **TWIN** is within 3" of and visible to this unit, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target that **TWIN** and this unit.
While 2 friendly **TWINS** are within 3" of and visible to this unit, subtract 1 from hit rolls and wound rolls for attacks that target those **TWINS** and this unit instead.

heroicTraits.name: Tethered to the Twins
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **TWIN** that has been destroyed to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

lores.name: Court of the Godlings Spell Lore

spells.name: Sibilant Whispers
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **COURT OF THE GODLINGS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, while a friendly **TWIN** is visible to the target, halve the target’s Move characteristic. In addition, while 2 friendly **TWINS** are visible to the target, your opponent must roll 1 fewer dice, to a minimum of 1, when making charge rolls for it.

spells.name: Ecstatic Furore
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **COURT OF THE GODLINGS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **TWIN** wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **COURT OF THE GODLINGS** units while they are wholly within 12" of and visible to the target.

spells.name: Essence Transfusion
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **COURT OF THE GODLINGS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **TWIN** to be the donor, pick another visible friendly **TWIN** to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Allocate any number of damage points to the donor (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). Then, **Heal (X)** the target, where **X** is double the number of damage points allocated to the donor by this use of this ability.

manifestationLores.name: Court of the Godlings Manifestation Lore

spells.name: Summon Manifestation of Depravity
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **COURT OF THE GODLINGS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH MANIFESTATION** that is not on the battlefield and that was not removed from play earlier in the same turn.

If you picked a **Dreadful Visage** or **Wheels of Excruciation**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. If you picked a **Mesmerising Mirror**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

armiesOfRenown.name: Decadent Host
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Sigvald’s sheer self-obsession is an elemental force that fills his followers with a need to offer him conquered lands as tribute. He delights in the adoration of ‘lesser’ mortals, and his volatile whim has spurred rampages across Ghur, the Ossiarch Empire and ravaged Hysh. Countless tales of atrocity surround the Decadent Host, and the Everchosen himself has called on them specifically to do his bidding. Sometimes, Sigvald even deigns to listen.

When you pick the Hedonites of Slaanesh faction for your army, you can choose for it to be the Decadent Host Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules described in Army of Renown the Decadent Host instead of the Hedonites of Slaanesh faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box opposite. All units in your army gain the **DECADENT HOST** keyword.

rules.name: Perfection Made Manifest
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick the friendly **Sigvald** to use this ability then pick a visible unit (friendly or enemy) within 3" of him to be the target.
rules.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. For each model slain by this ability this turn, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of the friendly **Sigvald**’s melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: The Prince in the Mirror
rules.declare: If the friendly **Sigvald** has been destroyed, pick him to be the target. He can be replaced any number of times.
rules.effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 6" of a friendly **Contorted Epitome** and not in combat.

rules.name: Petulant Wrath
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: If the friendly **Sigvald** is not in combat and did not charge this turn, pick him to use this ability, then pick another friendly **DECADENT HOST** unit within 1" of him to be the target.
rules.effect: Inflict D6 mortal damage on the target. Before removing any slain models from play, remove the friendly **Sigvald** from the battlefield then set him up again within 1" of the target.

rules.name: Infernal Handmaidens
rules.effect: While the friendly **Sigvald** is within 3" of and visible to any friendly **DECADENT HOST DAEMON** units, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by those **DAEMON** units.

rules.name: All for the Prince
rules.effect:
While the friendly **Sigvald** is within the combat range of another friendly **DECADENT HOST SYBARITE** unit:

• He has **WARD (2+)**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for him, allocate 1 damage point to another friendly **DECADENT HOST** unit within his combat range after the damage sequence for him has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

rules.name: Important People Have Important Places To Be
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.effect: If the friendly **Sigvald** is not contesting an objective, he can move 2D6" but must end that move contesting an objective. He can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.

artefacts.name: Mirror-Plate
artefacts.effect:
Weapons used by this unit have a maximum Attacks characteristic of 1.

While this unit is within 3" of and visible to the friendly **Sigvald**, add 20 to the friendly **Sigvald**’s control score.

heroicTraits.name: Protégé
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Reaction: You declared the 'The Prince in the Mirror' ability
heroicTraits.effect: You can set up a replacement **Sigvald** within 1" of this unit instead of within 6" of a friendly **Contorted Epitome**. If you do so, after setting up that replacement unit, this unit is automatically destroyed.

spells.name: Diverting Excruciation
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DECADENT HOST WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **Sigvald** wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

spells.name: Visions of Eternal Bliss
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DECADENT HOST WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **Sigvald** wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target scores critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

spells.name: Summon Manifestations of Depravity
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DECADENT HOST WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH MANIFESTATION** that is not on the battlefield and that was not removed from play earlier in the same turn.

If you picked a **Dreadful Visage** or **Wheels of Excruciation**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. If you picked a **Mesmerising Mirror**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

unitPool: Scourge of Ghyran Syll'Esske, the Vengeful Allegiance

spells.name: Hysterical Frenzy
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Last Ecstasy
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time a model in the target unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a dice. If the target unit is a **MONSTER**, roll 10 dice instead. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

spells.name: Overwhelming Acquiescence
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of the caster to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, weapons used by friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units for attacks that target that enemy unit, including **Companion** weapons, have **Crit (2 Hits)**.

spells.name: Summon Dreadful Visage
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Dreadful Visage** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Dreadful Visage** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Mesmerising Mirror
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Mesmerising Mirror** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Mesmerising Mirror** wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

spells.name: Summon Wheels of Excruciation
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Wheels of Excruciation** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Wheels of Excruciation** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Bashful Visage
artefacts.effect: While they are wholly within 6" of this unit, friendly non-**MONSTER** non-**WAR MACHINE** **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units are not visible to enemy units more than 12" from them.

artefacts.name: Crown of the Ur-Slaanesh
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO INFANTRY** **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: The Rod of Misrule
artefacts.declare: Pick another visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: For the rest of the turn, when the target uses the ‘Power Through’ command, you can pick an enemy target for that command that does not have a lower Health characteristic than the unit using that command.

heroicTraits.name: Centre of Attention
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, while this unit is wholly within 12" of the centre of the battlefield and visible to the target:

• Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by that enemy unit that target other friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units.
• Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by other friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units that target that enemy unit.

heroicTraits.name: Dilettante
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
heroicTraits.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

heroicTraits.name: Celebrity Warlord
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO SYBARITE** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

heroicTraits.name: Master of Temptation
heroicTraits.declare: You can only use this ability if your opponent has any **temptation dice**. Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, while your opponent has not used any of their **temptation dice** to replace a roll for the target this turn, the target can only use **CORE** abilities.

heroicTraits.name: The Need For Perfection
heroicTraits.effect: The first time each turn that an unmodified charge roll, casting roll, unbinding roll or banishment roll for a friendly non-**EUPHORIC** unit wholly within 12" of this unit is 5 or less, that unit has the **EUPHORIC** keyword for the rest of the turn.

other.name: Lurking Threat
other.declare: Pick each unit in this Regiment of Renown if none of those units have been deployed.
other.effect: Set up those units in reserve **lurking in the mists**. They have now been deployed.

other.name: The Mists Part
other.declare: Pick each unit in this Regiment of Renown if they are **lurking in the mists**.
other.effect: Set up the **Shardspeaker of Slaanesh** in this Regiment of Renown on the battlefield wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units. Then, set up the **Blissbarb Archers** unit in this Regiment of Renown on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that **Shardspeaker of Slaanesh**, wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

other.name: Spew Forth Sin
other.declare: Pick the **Contorted Epitome** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
other.effect:
Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH MANIFESTATION** that is not on the battlefield and that was not removed from play earlier in the same turn.

If you picked a **Dreadful Visage** or **Wheels of Excruciation**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. If you picked a **Mesmerising Mirror**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

battleTraits.name: Sensuous Arcana
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE PARAGON** that has successfully cast a spell this turn and has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: Until the start of your next turn, while the unit using this ability is a **PARAGON**, add 1 to casting rolls for visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units while they are wholly within 12" of the unit using this ability.

battleTraits.name: Paragons of Slaanesh
battleTraits.declare: If there are fewer than 3 friendly **PARAGONS** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** unit that does not have the **PARAGON** keyword and has not had the **PARAGON** keyword this battle to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
The target gains the **PARAGON** keyword.

**Designer’s Note:** *Friendly units with the **PARAGON*** *keyword on their warscroll count towards the* *number of friendly **PARAGONS** on the battlefield.* *If there are more than 3 friendly **PARAGONS** on the* *battlefield at the same time, you must immediately* *remove those units from the battlefield one at a time* *until there are only 3 friendly **PARAGONS** left on* *the battlefield.*

battleTraits.name: Fall From Grace
battleTraits.effect:
A friendly non-**UNIQUE PARAGON** immediately loses the **PARAGON** keyword when any of the following happen:

• That **PARAGON** has 3 or more damage points allocated to it by the same use of a non‑**ATTACK** ability.
• That **PARAGON** uses a **CHARGE** ability and the unmodified charge roll is 5 or less (after any re‑rolls).
• A spell cast by that **PARAGON** is **miscast** (after any re-rolls).

battleTraits.name: Cutting Barbs
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH HERO** that has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn to use this ability. Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with that **HERO** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
If the unit using this ability is a **PARAGON**, pick 1 of the effects below. Otherwise, your opponent must pick 1 of the effects below.

***Rise to the Insults***: For the rest of the turn, the target has a maximum control score of 1.

***Turn Aside from the Insults***: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units that target that enemy unit.

battleTraits.name: Beguiling Glance
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH HERO** unit that has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn to use this ability. Then, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of that **HERO** to be the target.

battleTraits.name: Chief of Revels
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Charge Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE PARAGON** that charged this turn and has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: Until the start of your next turn, while the unit using this ability is a **PARAGON**, add 2 to charge rolls for friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units while they are wholly within 12" of the unit using this ability.

battleTraits.name: Enthralling Vanity
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH HERO** unit that has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn to use this ability. Then, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of that **HERO** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
If the unit using this ability is a **PARAGON**, pick 1 of the effects below. Otherwise, your opponent must pick 1 of the effects below.

***Mesmerised***: For the rest of the turn, weapons used by friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units for attacks that target that unit, including **Companion** weapons, have **Crit (2 Hits)**.

***Break their Gaze***: For the rest of the turn, other than the **Companion** ability, weapon abilities for combat attacks made by the target have no effect.

battleTraits.name: Excess of Agility
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE PARAGON** that has not used a **TEMPTATION** ability this turn to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, while the unit using this ability is a **PARAGON** and is in combat, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target visible friendly **HEDONITES OF SLAANESH** units while they are wholly within 12" of the unit using this ability.
